servers.description: Coolify Cloud API. Change the host to your own instance if you are self-hosting.

get.description: List all applications.

post.description: Create new application based on a public git repository.

requestBody.description: Application object that needs to be created.

environment_name.description: The environment name. You need to provide at least one of environment_name or environment_uuid.

environment_uuid.description: The environment UUID. You need to provide at least one of environment_name or environment_uuid.

domains.description: The application URLs in a comma-separated list.

is_static.description: The flag to indicate if the application is static.

is_spa.description: The flag to indicate if the application is a single-page application (SPA). Only relevant when is_static is true.

is_auto_deploy_enabled.description: The flag to indicate if auto-deploy is enabled on git push. Defaults to true.

is_force_https_enabled.description: The flag to indicate if HTTPS is forced. Defaults to true.

base_directory.description: The base directory for all commands.

health_check_start_period.description: Health check start period in seconds.

redirect.description: How to set redirect with Traefik / Caddy. www<->non-www.

instant_deploy.description: The flag to indicate if the application should be deployed instantly.

dockerfile_location.description: The Dockerfile location in the repository.

docker_compose_custom_start_command.description: The Docker Compose custom start command.

docker_compose_custom_build_command.description: The Docker Compose custom build command.

docker_compose_domains.description: Array of URLs to be applied to containers of a dockercompose application.

name.description: The service name as defined in docker-compose.

connect_to_docker_network.description: The flag to connect the service to the predefined Docker network.

force_domain_override.description: Force domain usage even if conflicts are detected. Default is false.

autogenerate_domain.description: If true and domains is empty, auto-generate a domain using the server's wildcard domain or sslip.io fallback. Default: true.

is_container_label_escape_enabled.description: Escape special characters in labels. By default, $ (and other chars) is escaped. So if you write $ in the labels, it will be saved as $$. If you want to use env variables inside the labels, turn this off.

domains.description: The application URLs in a comma-separated list.

is_static.description: The flag to indicate if the application is static.

is_spa.description: The flag to indicate if the application is a single-page application (SPA). Only relevant when is_static is true.

is_auto_deploy_enabled.description: The flag to indicate if auto-deploy is enabled on git push. Defaults to true.

health_check_start_period.description: Health check start period in seconds.

redirect.description: How to set redirect with Traefik / Caddy. www<->non-www.

instant_deploy.description: The flag to indicate if the application should be deployed instantly.

dockerfile_location.description: The Dockerfile location in the repository.

docker_compose_custom_start_command.description: The Docker Compose custom start command.

docker_compose_custom_build_command.description: The Docker Compose custom build command.

docker_compose_domains.description: Array of URLs to be applied to containers of a dockercompose application.

name.description: The service name as defined in docker-compose.

connect_to_docker_network.description: The flag to connect the service to the predefined Docker network.

force_domain_override.description: Force domain usage even if conflicts are detected. Default is false.

is_container_label_escape_enabled.description: Escape special characters in labels. By default, $ (and other chars) is escaped. So if you write $ in the labels, it will be saved as $$. If you want to use env variables inside the labels, turn this off.

is_preserve_repository_enabled.description: Preserve git repository during application update. If false, the existing repository will be removed and replaced with the new one. If true, the existing repository will be kept and the new one will be ignored. Default is false.

get.description: Start application. `Post` request is also accepted.
Stop application. `Post` request is also accepted.

parameters.name: docker_cleanup
parameters.description: Perform docker cleanup (prune networks, volumes, etc.).

get.description: Restart application. `Post` request is also accepted.
List all persistent storages and file storages by application UUID.

post.description: Create a persistent storage or file storage for an application.

name.description: Volume name (persistent only, required for persistent).

is_directory.description: Whether this is a directory mount (file only, default false).

fs_path.description: Host directory path (required when is_directory is true).

patch.description: Update a persistent storage or file storage by application UUID.

requestBody.description: Storage updated. For read-only storages (from docker-compose or services), only is_preview_suffix_enabled can be updated.

id.description: The ID of the storage (deprecated, use uuid instead).

type.description: The type of storage: persistent or file.

is_preview_suffix_enabled.description: Whether to add -pr-N suffix for preview deployments.

name.description: The volume name (persistent only, not allowed for read-only storages).

mount_path.description: The container mount path (not allowed for read-only storages).

host_path.description: The host path (persistent only, not allowed for read-only storages).

content.description: The file content (file only, not allowed for read-only storages).

delete.description: Delete a persistent storage or file storage by application UUID.
Delete a preview deployment for a pull request. Cancels active deployments, stops containers, removes volumes/networks, and deletes the preview record.

parameters.name: pull_request_id
parameters.description: Pull request ID of the preview to delete.

post.description: Create a new scheduled backup configuration for a database

frequency.description: Backup frequency (cron expression or: every_minute, hourly, daily, weekly, monthly, yearly)

save_s3.description: Whether to save backups to S3

s3_storage_uuid.description: S3 storage UUID (required if save_s3 is true)

databases_to_backup.description: Comma separated list of databases to backup

backup_now.description: Whether to trigger backup immediately after creation

database_backup_retention_amount_locally.description: Number of backups to retain locally

database_backup_retention_days_locally.description: Number of days to retain backups locally

database_backup_retention_amount_s3.description: Number of backups to retain in S3

database_backup_retention_days_s3.description: Number of days to retain backups in S3

timeout.description: Backup job timeout in seconds (min: 60, max: 36000)

delete.description: Delete database by UUID.

limits_memory_swap.description: Memory swap limit of the database

delete.description: Deletes a backup configuration and all its executions.

parameters.description: UUID of the backup configuration to delete

parameters.name: delete_s3
parameters.description: Whether to delete all backup files from S3

patch.description: Update a specific backup configuration for a given database, identified by its UUID and the backup ID

database_backup_retention_days_s3.description: Retention days of the backup in s3

database_backup_retention_max_storage_s3.description: Max storage of the backup in S3

timeout.description: Backup job timeout in seconds (min: 60, max: 36000)

parameters.description: Preview deployment identifier. Alias of pr.

parameters.description: Docker image tag for Docker Image preview deployments. Requires pull_request_id.

key.description: The key of the environment variable.

value.description: The value of the environment variable.

is_preview.description: The flag to indicate if the environment variable is used in preview deployments.

is_literal.description: The flag to indicate if the environment variable is a literal, nothing espaced.

is_multiline.description: The flag to indicate if the environment variable is multiline.

is_shown_once.description: The flag to indicate if the environment variable's value is shown on the UI.

get.description: Start service. `Post` request is also accepted.
Stop service. `Post` request is also accepted.

parameters.name: docker_cleanup
parameters.description: Perform docker cleanup (prune networks, volumes, etc.).

get.description: Restart service. `Post` request is also accepted.
List all persistent storages and file storages by service UUID.

post.description: Create a persistent storage or file storage for a service sub-resource.

resource_uuid.description: UUID of the service application or database sub-resource.

name.description: Volume name (persistent only, required for persistent).

is_directory.description: Whether this is a directory mount (file only, default false).

fs_path.description: Host directory path (required when is_directory is true).

patch.description: Update a persistent storage or file storage by service UUID.

requestBody.description: Storage updated. For read-only storages (from docker-compose or services), only is_preview_suffix_enabled can be updated.

id.description: The ID of the storage (deprecated, use uuid instead).

type.description: The type of storage: persistent or file.

is_preview_suffix_enabled.description: Whether to add -pr-N suffix for preview deployments.

name.description: The volume name (persistent only, not allowed for read-only storages).

mount_path.description: The container mount path (not allowed for read-only storages).

host_path.description: The host path (persistent only, not allowed for read-only storages).

content.description: The file content (file only, not allowed for read-only storages).

delete.description: Delete a persistent storage or file storage by service UUID.
